generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Just saw this in my local news - another attempted attack thwarted by our domestic security agencies. These threats are real, and they're getting more sophisticated. We can't afford to weaken our defenses with bureaucratic red tape. Our families deserve protection, and that means giving our security services the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurityFirst #SupportOurAgencies
